title: Caltrans Equipment Rental Rates and Labor Surcharge

indexed_extract.summary: Caltrans publishes labor surcharge and equipment rental rate books in PDF and accessible CSV, including 04/01/2025 through 03/31/2026.
key_points: Accessible CSV files exist and should be treated as canonical public-works equipment seed inputs.
The current cycle listed is 04/01/2025 through 03/31/2026.
Model as effective-dated equipment rate books with ingestion manifests.
